title: Mouse Perfusion with Dye, DAPI Staining, and Slide Preparation
author: Boaz Mohar
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.59jg94n

steps.title: Add 50-100 ul of 1mM dye...
steps.instruction: Add 50-100 ul of 1mM dye stock to 50 mL, per mouse of 4% paraformaldehyde in .1M PB

steps.title: Set up fume hood with
steps.instruction: Set up fume hood with: Dissection tray (VWR, 470006-956) Peristaltic pump-102R (Watson-Marlow, 013.7101.000) Surgical Scissors (Fine Science tools, 14090-09, https://www.finescience.com/en-US/Search?searchtext=14090-09 ) Forceps (Fine Science tools, 11223-20, https://www.finescience.com/en-US/Products/Forceps-Hemostats/Dumont-Forceps/Dumont-2-Laminectomy-Forceps/11223-20 ) Falcon Tube (50 mL) Fischer Scientific

steps.title: Add 100 µL of DMSO to...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µL of DMSO to lyophilized dye (100nmol) and Pipette up and down ~20 times to get 1mM concentration stock. Dimethyl sulfoxide (DMSO) Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #D2650

steps.title: Mix further using a vortex machine...
steps.instruction: Mix further using a vortex machine to ensure the dye is evenly distributed in the DMSO

steps.title: Perfusion pump preparation Attach needle
steps.instruction: Perfusion pump preparation Attach needle: Surflo winged infusion set 21G 3/4 (Terumo, TER 3SV-21BLK) to pump tubing and flush with ~ 20 mL of 1x PBS PBS Fisher Scientific Catalog #BP24384 to clear tubing of previous solution

steps.title: Retreive animal per vivarium protocol
steps.instruction: Retreive animal per vivarium protocol

steps.title: Prepare 4% Paraformaldehye in 0
steps.instruction: Prepare 4% Paraformaldehye in 0.1M PB see here

steps.title: Anesthetize mouse in 2000ml glass beake
steps.instruction: Anesthetize mouse in 2000ml glass beake

steps.title: Place the animal inside the container...
steps.instruction: Place the animal inside the container on a raised platform and cover. (Platform can be square slides box lid or styrafoam from 50ml tube packaging) (DO NOT allow the liquid isofluorane to come into contact with the animals’ skin)

steps.title: As soon as the animal stops...
steps.instruction: As soon as the animal stops breathing, remove from contain, check for pain response by gently pinching the foot with forceps and make sure no reflexive response and place on dissection tray. Timing is extremely important. If the animals is over-exposed to the isofluorane than the heart will stop beating and cell death can occur.

steps.title: Begin perfusion
steps.instruction: Begin perfusion

steps.title: Lay mouse on its back and...
steps.instruction: Lay mouse on its back and place a pin in each front paw, others as needed.

steps.title: Use scissors to cut parallel to...
steps.instruction: Use scissors to cut parallel to the sternum, opening the chest cavity and exposeing the heart.

steps.title: Insert winged needle into the right ventricle
steps.instruction: Insert winged needle into the right ventricle.

steps.title: Cut left atrium
steps.instruction: Cut left atrium.

steps.title: Start perfusion pump and flush 50...
steps.instruction: Start perfusion pump and flush 50 mL, 4% PFA with 100 µL, of Dye at a rate of 7.5ml/min. (Animal will "twitch" when the fixative circulates through the bloodstream. If no reaction occurs check postion of the needle in the heart.)

steps.title: "Stop" perfuison pump when all fixative...
steps.instruction: "Stop" perfuison pump when all fixative is flushed through the animal.

steps.title: Unpin mouse from dissection tray and decapitate behind ears
steps.instruction: Unpin mouse from dissection tray and decapitate behind ears. (Place carcass in small biohazard bag for disposal.)

steps.title: Remove the fur from the head...
steps.instruction: Remove the fur from the head and cut small slits into the skull by placing scissor tip on eithier side of the opening where the spinal cord connect to the brain.

steps.title: Use forceps to peel off skull...
steps.instruction: Use forceps to peel off skull cap and scope out brain.

steps.title: Post-fix brain in 20 mL, 4%...
steps.instruction: Post-fix brain in 20 mL, 4% PFA 16:00:00 at 4 °C

steps.title: Rinse 3 times 00:15:00 00:15:00 00:15:00...
steps.instruction: Rinse 3 times 00:15:00 00:15:00 00:15:00 in PBS PBS Fisher Scientific Catalog #BP24384 at Room temperature

steps.title: pour 5 mL isoflorane down the side of the container
steps.instruction: pour 5 mL isoflorane down the side of the container. Isoflurane 1-3% Patterson Veterinary Catalog #07-893-1389

steps.title: Prepare 50 mL, 4% agarose
steps.instruction: Prepare 50 mL, 4% agarose

steps.title: Add 2
steps.instruction: Add 2.5 g Agarose LE Electron Microscopy Sciences Catalog #87046 into 50 mL, 1x PBS PBS Fisher Scientific Catalog #BP24384 in 500ml glass bottle with cap. (do not fully tighten cap onto bottle so steam can vent while heating)

steps.title: Heat in microwave for 00:01:20
steps.instruction: Heat in microwave for 00:01:20 . Check to see if all agarose is dissolved. If not re-heat at 00:00:10 intervals till completely dissolved.

steps.title: Pour agarose into Peel-A-Way® Embedding Mold...
steps.instruction: Pour agarose into Peel-A-Way® Embedding Mold (Square - S22) (polysciences, 18646A-1) and orient brain in mold.

steps.title: Allow agarose to set about 00:10:00...
steps.instruction: Allow agarose to set about 00:10:00 (will change from transparent to slighly cloudy and will become firm to the touch.)

steps.title: Prep Vibratome VT 1200s Vibratome (Leica, 1491200S001, https://www
steps.instruction: Prep Vibratome VT 1200s Vibratome (Leica, 1491200S001, https://www.leicabiosystems.com/histology-equipment/sliding-and-vibrating-blade-microtomes/vibrating-blade-microtome/leica-vt1200-s/ ) with Silver blue double edge razor blade (Gillette) Amazon Catalog #884718268996

steps.title: Adjust vibratome settings
steps.instruction: Adjust vibratome settings: Amplitude 1.00mm Speed .70mm/s Feed (thickness) 100um

steps.title: Fill buffer tray with 300 mL, 1x PBS
steps.instruction: Fill buffer tray with 300 mL, 1x PBS

steps.title: Section desired region at 50um or 100um
steps.instruction: Section desired region at 50um or 100um.

steps.title: Float sections in cell culture plate...
steps.instruction: Float sections in cell culture plate 24 well Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) (Single section per well) with each well filled with 500 µL, 1x PBS (Label plate and wrap with aluminum foil)

steps.title: DAPI stain
steps.instruction: DAPI stain

steps.title: Add 2
steps.instruction: Add 2.1 µL, DAPI stock to 50 mL, 1xPBS DAPI Thermo Scientific Catalog #D1306

steps.title: Select desired sections and remove PBS from wells
steps.instruction: Select desired sections and remove PBS from wells.

steps.title: Add 500 µL, per well of...
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL, per well of DAPI stain to each well for 02:00:00

steps.title: Rinse 2 times 00:05:00 00:05:00 with 500 µL, 1x PBS
steps.instruction: Rinse 2 times 00:05:00 00:05:00 with 500 µL, 1x PBS

steps.title: Mount sections on Superfrost Plus Microscope...
steps.instruction: Mount sections on Superfrost Plus Microscope Slies Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #4951PLUS4

steps.title: Allow sections to dry for at least 02:00:00
steps.instruction: Allow sections to dry for at least 02:00:00

steps.title: Rehydrate slides in 250 mL, 1x PBS for 00:30:00
steps.instruction: Rehydrate slides in 250 mL, 1x PBS for 00:30:00

steps.title: Cover-slip slides with 130 µL, vecatshield...
steps.instruction: Cover-slip slides with 130 µL, vecatshield and allow to fully dry for 12:00:00 VECTASHIELD® Hardset™ Antifade Mounting Medium Vector Laboratories Catalog #H-1400
